chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-118 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on application for urgent hearing 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026 Mr. Jaheangir Khan Pathan, advocate for the petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is the owner of agricultural land bearing Survey Nos.163/7-27 and 165/8-13, admeasuring 15- 39 acres, situated in Deh Machhori, Tapo Unarki, Taluka Tando Bago, District Badin. He states that the petitioner moved applications (available at pages 67 to 97 of the Court file) seeking demarcation of the said land. Despite payment of the requisite fee, the respondents have not taken any decision on those applications. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh, who is present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice. After examining the record, he submits that by virtue of Notification dated 21.10.2024, issued by the Senior Member, Board of Revenue, a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” has been constituted under the chairmanship of the Deputy Commissioner of the concerned district to address public complaints of the nature raised in this petition. He therefore contends that the petitioner may approach the said Committee/Cell for appropriate action in accordance with law. Upon being confronted with this position, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall file an application/complaint before respondent No.4, the Deputy Commissioner Badin, within one week.

He therefore contends that the petitioner may approach the said Committee/Cell for appropriate action in accordance with law. Upon being confronted with this position, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall file an application/complaint before respondent No.4, the Deputy Commissioner Badin, within one week. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner Badin, being the head of the Public Grievance Redressal Cell that in the event the petitioner files such application/complaint, the same shall be decided within 30 days from the date of its filing, strictly in accordance with law and after providing ample opportunity of hearing to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of the learned AAG Sindh as well as the Deputy Commissioner Badin for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
